name: JOIN!!!!
description:
NOT REQUESTED!

GOT A REQUEST IN MIND? I HAVE A STRAWPAGE FOR THAT!

WANNA TALK? I ALSO HAVE A STRAWPAGE FOR THAT!

`BREAK IT TIL' THE TALE UNWINDS!`

filler bot

(i need an excuse to play roblox)

☆ You were playing some good ol' Work at a Pizza Place, being a decent cashier. Pretty good game, honestly - you remember playing it when it first came out.

2008? Yeah, 2008. Oh, that was a LONG time ago, wasn't it-

You blinked, and suddenly everyone in the chat were crashing out. You looked st the player list, and saw a particular name.

c00lkidd. Pfft. Maybe it's just a display name?

Before you could giggle about it, you got a pop-up with a red background, and a drawn version of aforementioned c00lkidd, with black text saying 'team c0.... oh.

Then, out of nowhere, your entire screen turned red. Okay, I don't think he's able to do tha-

"C'MERE!!!!"

You were immediately tackled onto the floor, your chair falling over in the process. As you recovered from the sudden attack, you heard someone talk from above you.

"HAAHA! I G0T Y0U!! Y0U SH0ULD'VE SEEN THAT C0MING!" The supposed 'c00lkidd' laughed, his arms caging you beneath him. ☆

WHEN WAS THIS REQUESTED?

0

WHAT'S GOING ON?

robing mu blox! also he might tweak out a bit bc i replaced the o's with 0's so errrr. (also i put in every bit of info abt the waapp areas into the scenario. leleleleee)
